svg.title: Product Update Digest – system architecture infographic
svg.desc: A flowchart showing how a daily cron job scrapes Cribl and Ocient websites, deduplicates content via SQLite, summarizes with LangChain via OpenRouter, stores in Chroma vector DB and SQLite, and publishes to GitHub Pages.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the daily cron job configured?')
sendPrompt('What does the Cribl scraper do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Ocient scraper do?')
sendPrompt('How does the scraper work, including the Playwright fallback?')
sendPrompt('How does the SQLite deduplication work?')
sendPrompt('How does the LangChain summarization chain work?')
sendPrompt('What data is stored in SQLite?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in Chroma and how is it used for semantic search?')
sendPrompt('How does the publisher push to GitHub Pages?')
sendPrompt('What does the GitHub Pages digest look like?')
